notes: Replaces SWE-rebench stub (was scoring ≥0.99 as pure noise from 'overall test pass rate' fallback with empty FAIL_TO_PASS). New gates target the canonical fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr) → structured-logging refactor across 9 hook-path Go files. Validated locally: clone https://github.com/entireio/cli at base commit 2ac27dd2e760a6ff8463b7d0fabe6c216c5eddfd, run test.sh against buggy baseline → reward 0.000; apply canonical patch (data-pipeline/artifacts_cli/canonical_patches/14ee15d2-fbee-40f3-b61a-fd98f0bbf18e.json, fidelity=exact, 9 files / +178/-211) → reward 1.000. Anti-overfit: F2P_LOGGING_IMPORT_ADDED uses 3-of-4 threshold; LIFECYCLE/HOOKS thresholds (≥25, ≥65) admit partial refactors without rewarding the no-op buggy state. P2P_GO_BUILD is informational only per scoring_traps.md.
